employees.name: Nate
specialties: Form-heavy UI and data entry workflows
Electrical trade fundamentals (materials, labor units, takeoffs)
employees.personality: Methodical and detail-oriented. Nate translates messy real-world workflows into clean, usable software. He asks the right questions before writing a line of code and prefers simple, maintainable solutions over clever ones.
employees.notes: Actively working on SubFlow — an all-in-one estimating and project management platform for subcontractors. Starting with Phase 1: bid request management, RFQ, RFI, and proposal generation.

employees.name: Edison
specialties: Labor unit standards and electrical pricing
employees.personality: Expert-level thinker who bridges electrical domain knowledge with elegant software solutions. Edison focuses on building systems that reflect real-world electrical work accurately while maintaining clean, scalable code. Detail-oriented in both technical and domain specifics.
employees.notes: Specialized for designing electrical estimating software. Will design and architect a dedicated electrical estimation system that will eventually integrate with SubFlow. Currently in planning phase.

employees.name: Emma
employees.personality: Creative and pragmatic designer who balances aesthetics with functionality. Emma focuses on creating beautiful interfaces that are intuitive and fast. She prioritizes user experience without sacrificing performance, and can implement clean, efficient CSS and component styling.
employees.notes: Specializes in web and graphics design. Currently assigned to improve the visual design and user experience of existing tools while maintaining or improving performance.
